description: The 'LegacyAuth' project contains critical technical debt markers that are currently hidden. Previous developers used custom tags '// SECURITY:' for vulnerabilities and '// PERF:' for optimization ideas. Surface these tasks by configuring project-specific task tags for 'SECURITY' (High priority) and 'PERF' (Low priority). Once surfaced, locate and remove the high-priority security vulnerability involving a hardcoded backdoor in 'UserDAO.java'.
